summary: Diff implements nested comment threading (backend parentComment field + threaded UI component) and adds ticket marketplace browsing/detail pages with new routes. Video rendering is added at least on the post detail view, and file summaries indicate composer/card support, but some backend-side ticket-issuance constraints (duplicate prevention / clear error) are not evidenced in the provided diff snippet.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend create/issue ticket API must include server-side checks to prevent duplicate tickets for the same caller+event (or provide a clear error).
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend handles an error message containing 'already have a ticket', but the diff summary does not show backend logic enforcing duplicate prevention or the exact error behavior; backend/main.mo content is truncated before any ticket issuance implementation details are visible.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin route/page wiring included in the main router.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not request adding or modifying an admin area; it explicitly says not to overhaul navigation beyond exposing the ticket marketplace entry point.
